name: basic_content_application
description: Basic pict-section-content example with KaTeX and Mermaid

scripts.build: npx quack build && npx quack copy

author: steven

ExampleApplication.Title: Basic Content
ExampleApplication.Summary: Renders one markdown document with headings, lists, tables, code blocks, KaTeX equations, and Mermaid diagrams via the provider + view pair.
